Phase-32.NAME: Domain TLS and Shared 443 Edge
Phase-32.Goal: Define and implement the krotpn.xyz production edge for HTTPS redirect, wildcard TLS, and shared 443 MTProto coexistence.

NonGoals.item-1: No redesign of operator-approved deploy/install scripts without explicit approval.
NonGoals.item-2: No admin UX work in this phase.

Steps.step-1: Define edge settings for krotpn.xyz, canonical frontend URL, wildcard certificate paths, and MTProto SNI domain suffix.
Steps.step-2: Add static nginx/edge contract for HTTP to HTTPS redirect and canonical host handling.
Steps.step-3: Design shared 443 routing: MTProto fake-TLS by issued SNI, normal HTTPS fallback to KrotPN nginx/frontend/backend/admin.
Steps.step-4: Create local/static verification for redirect, certificate path expectations, and no accidental deploy/install rewrite.
Steps.step-5: Prepare rollback notes and staging/live smoke checklist for krotpn.xyz cutover.
Steps.step-6: Run production-like smoke only after operator provides wildcard certificate and DNS readiness.

Verification.command: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_domain_tls_edge_static.py -v

sh -c 'if [ -e .env ]; then DB_PASSWORD=phase32-compose-check docker compose config; else ln -s .env.example .env && trap "rm -f .env" EXIT && DB_PASSWORD=phase32-compose-check docker compose config; fi'

python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-32.xml docs/modules/M-046.xml docs/verification/V-M-046.xml docs/edge/PHASE-32-CUTOVER.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml && mygrace lint
blocked-live: http://krotpn.xyz redirects to https://krotpn.xyz and HTTPS/MTProto surfaces stay healthy after DNS and wildcard TLS readiness.

AcceptanceCriteria.item-1: HTTP requests to krotpn.xyz redirect permanently to HTTPS.
AcceptanceCriteria.item-2: Wildcard certificate covers krotpn.xyz and *.krotpn.xyz before MTProto production links are advertised.
AcceptanceCriteria.item-3: Shared 443 edge is tested with both normal HTTPS and at least one issued MTProto SNI.
AcceptanceCriteria.item-4: Rollback path restores the previous nginx-only 443 behavior if shared edge fails.

Risks.risk-1: 443 ownership conflict between nginx and MTProto edge can take the whole public surface down.
Risks.risk-2: Let's Encrypt wildcard DNS-01 is operator-dependent and cannot be fully proven locally.

Completion.item-1: M-001 now exposes krotpn.xyz frontend, edge domain, wildcard certificate path, and shared 443 readiness settings.
Completion.item-2: nginx now includes a canonical krotpn.xyz/www HTTP to HTTPS redirect and a wildcard HTTPS fallback server while preserving legacy default HTTP/HTTPS behavior.
Completion.item-3: Phase-32 local static tests and smoke script verify redirect contract, TLS path expectations, compose config, protected deploy/install guard, and rollback runbook.
Completion.item-4: M-044/M-043/M-040 regression tests passed for runtime bridge, scheduler, MTProto provisioning, email delivery, and email verification URL behavior.

BlockedLive.item-1: Production-like smoke remains blocked until DNS points at the intended edge and a trusted wildcard certificate for krotpn.xyz and *.krotpn.xyz is installed.
BlockedLive.item-2: Actual MTProto shared 443 route must be enabled and verified during an operator rollback window; local execution only defines the safe contract and fallback.
